name: Codacy MCP Server — Code Quality & Security
what_it_does: Official Codacy MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with Codacy's code quality and security platform — fetching code quality metrics, checking security issues, reviewing pull request analysis, querying code coverage data, and integrating Codacy's automated code review into agent-driven development workflow automation.
use_cases: Checking code quality issues from CI/CD pipeline agents
Reviewing security vulnerabilities identified by Codacy from code review agents
Monitoring code coverage trends from quality tracking agents
Querying pull request analysis results from development workflow agents
Integrating Codacy metrics into AI coding assistant feedback loops
Building quality-gated deployment workflows from DevOps agents
not_for: Teams not using Codacy (use SonarQube, Semgrep, or Snyk MCPs for other tools)
One-time local static analysis (use CLI tools directly)
Teams needing on-premise code quality without cloud (Codacy is primarily SaaS)
best_when: A development team using Codacy needs AI agents to query code quality metrics, security findings, and coverage data as part of automated code review workflows.
avoid_when: You use SonarQube, Snyk, or other code quality tools — use their respective MCPs.

auth.notes: Codacy API token required. Available from Codacy account settings. Account API tokens or project API tokens available with different scope levels.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Codacy: free for public repositories and limited private repos
pricing.paid_tiers: Codacy Business: per-user pricing for private repos
pricing.notes: Codacy is free for open source projects. Official MCP from Codacy team.

performance.rate_limits: Codacy API: rate limits per API tier

known_agent_gotchas: Codacy analysis runs async — latest analysis results may lag behind code changes
Repository must be integrated with Codacy before querying issues
Different token types (account vs project) have different permission scopes
Issue counts can be large — filter and paginate carefully
Official Codacy MCP — quality high and actively maintained
Security issues require human triage — don't auto-merge based on Codacy scores alone
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Codacy API token — project vs account scope. Official Codacy MCP. Code quality data may expose security issues — handle appropriately. SOC2 compliant platform.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS. API token with scope control. Official Codacy. SOC2. Security findings need human triage.
